title: NotBar
body:
![a full hotbar with this resourcepack!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/937dcbf71f24651e1e4a7ac67050199210eb82e5.png)

This super awesome resourcepack from java version 1.20.2 until 1.21.8 (current newest version) makes the hotbar invisible!

made by everyones favourite goose: [thatgoosegoose](https://www.youtube.com/@thatgoosegoose)

if you have a question about this resourcepack you can ask in the [PlanetMinecraft](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/notbar/) page

If you would like this pack for any older version, i have the files ready from Java Edition version 1.8.9 until 1.20.1 (It would just be annoying to post because I would have to change the pack_format for each version). Just ask in the PlanetMinecraft
